use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms, dialogs, and navigation
Styled interactive buttons with multiple visual variants for different contexts
Accessible button component with focus-visible ring states for keyboard navigation
Reusable UI primitive with consistent styling across applications
Button with asChild pattern for composition with Radix UI Slot
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard focus-visible ring states for accessibility, hover transitions, and disabled states. Designed as an atomic UI primitive suitable for composition into larger interface components.
